choices.text: Joby Aviation (Toyota-backed, FAA cert progress), Archer Aviation (Stellantis), Beta Technologies, Lilium, EHang. ~100-150 mile range, 4-6 pax, 150 mph cruise. First commercial flights 2025-2026. ~65 dB at 100 ft (vs heli 95 dB).

Vertiports: dedicated urban landing pads on rooftops/transit hubs + charging + ATC integration. ~$10-50M each. New UAM corridors at 200-500 ft, dedicated routes, AI traffic management. Active FAA + NASA research.
